creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
Created diff for the following to upgrade to Django 2.2:

www/seahub
- www/py-django-constance
- www/py-django-jsonfield
- www/py-django-picklefield
- www/py-django-post_office
- www/py-django-ranged-response
- www/py-django-simple-captcha
- www/py-django-statici18n
- www/py-django-webpack-loader


The following will be deleted as they are no longer required.
www/py-djangorestframework311

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D28513
